name: @ismail-elkorchi/episteme
description: Deterministic, agent-first extraction of structured knowledge.

scripts.extract:example: node src/cli.js extract --manifest examples/manifest.json --out out --format json
scripts.extract:md: node src/cli.js extract --manifest examples/manifest.json --out out --format md
scripts.test: npm run test:xml && npm run test:html-engine && npm run test:html && npm run test:html:golden && npm run test:pdf
scripts.check:deno: npm run prepare:parser-stack && deno run --allow-read --node-modules-dir=manual tests/xml-extractor.test.js && deno run --allow-read --node-modules-dir=manual tests/html-engine.contract.test.js && deno run --allow-read --node-modules-dir=manual tests/html-extractor.test.js && deno run --allow-read --node-modules-dir=manual tests/html-golden.test.js && deno run --allow-read --node-modules-dir=manual tests/pdf-extractor.test.js
scripts.check:bun: npm run prepare:parser-stack && bun tests/xml-extractor.test.js && bun tests/html-engine.contract.test.js && bun tests/html-extractor.test.js && bun tests/html-golden.test.js && bun tests/pdf-extractor.test.js
scripts.check:ci: npm run prepare:parser-stack && npm run check && npm run check:holdout && npm run package:check
